positive: A stylized cosmic sloth relaxing among bioluminescent jungle foliage. The sloth has a deep, saturated sapphire blue fur and is nestled amongst oversized, glowing leaves and tropical roots that pulse with soft emerald and magenta light. The composition is highly symmetrical, featuring a central, relaxed silhouette of the sloth against a dark, abstract cosmic backdrop that hints at nebulas and distant stars. Use a high-contrast, graphic novel aesthetic with thick, clean outlines and vibrant, flat color fields, reminiscent of retro mid-century modern poster art. The overall mood is tranquil and mystical. Suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low resolution, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, photorealistic, 3d render, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts
